description: The LegacyCloudStorageSpaceIndicator component was used in old migrated legacy content that showed the cloud storage usage for a user. This component should not be used in new content and should be replaced when possible.

fields.Source: The source of the cloud usage data.
fields.ContainerColor: The color of the UI container.
fields.UsedColor: The normal color when storage has been used.
fields.LowSpaceColor: The color to use when space is low.
fields.CriticalSpaceColor: The color to use when space is almost filled or beyond filled.
fields.LowSpaceThreshold: The percentage 0 to 1 for cloud storage to be considered low space.
fields.CriticalSpaceThreshold: The percentage from 0 to 1 for cloud storage to be considered critically full.
fields._ownerLabel: The text renderer that shows the owner of this cloud storage indicator.
fields._usageLabel: The text renderer that shows the usage of the cloud storage for the user.
fields._percentLabel: The text renderer that shows the percentage full for the cloud storage of the user.
fields._progressBar: The UI used to show the amount of storage used as a progress bar.
fields.__legacyOwnerId: The legacy owner ID for what user this component was supposed to show the cloud storage for.
fields.__legacyMemberQuota: Whether this component was supposed to show the amount of storage a user was using for a group shared storage that they were allocated.
